titles.title: To extend the Secure Rural Schools and Community Self-Determination Act of 2000.
To extend the Secure Rural Schools and Community Self-Determination Act of 2000.

action.text: Referred to the Committee on Agriculture, and in addition to the Committee on Natural Resources, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.

Referred to the Committee on Agriculture, and in addition to the Committee on Natural Resources, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
Referred to the Subcommittee on Forestry and Horticulture.

bill.summary:
This bill extends and modifies the Secure Rural Schools and Community Self-Determination Act of 2000, including by
extending payments made to states and counties containing federal land through FY2026,providing for payments for FY2024 and FY2025,extending the authority of counties to initiate projects using such funds through FY2028, andextending the authority to initiate projects proposed by resource advisory committees through FY2028.
